# CWE-421: alternate channel access is synchronized with the primary handler.
lang: go
file: CWE-421-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"io"
	"net/http"
	"sync"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

var (
	transferMu    sync.Mutex
	transferToken string
)

func WireTransferNotify(r *gin.Engine) {
	r.POST("/transfer/authorize", func(c *gin.Context) {
		transferMu.Lock()
		transferToken = c.PostForm("token")
		transferMu.Unlock()
		c.Status(http.StatusOK)
	})
	r.GET("/transfer/events", func(c *gin.Context) {
		c.Stream(func(w io.Writer) bool {
			transferMu.Lock()
			payload := transferToken
			transferMu.Unlock()
			_, _ = w.Write([]byte("event: status\ndata: " + payload + "\n\n"))
			return false
		})
	})
}
